title: Long Handled Dustpan and Brush Set – Broom and Dustpan Set Reduce Bending Tall Lobby Dustpan and Sweeping Brush (Black & Grey)
features: No More Back Aches - Bid farewell to the discomfort of back aches caused by tedious sweeping. This exceptional broom and dustpan set is thoughtfully designed with a remarkable long handle that enables you to clean with utmost comfort while standing upright, significantly reducing strain on your back. Embrace a pain-free cleaning experience that allows you to effortlessly maintain a spotless environment without sacrificing your well-being with our long handled dustpan and brush.

Wide Opening Dustpan - Prepare to be amazed by the wide opening of the dustpan included in this dustpan and brush sets long handle. Its intelligently crafted design ensures that sweeping up debris and dirt is a breeze, eliminating any spillage or frustration. The generously sized opening of this long handle dustpan and brush guarantees efficient and hassle-free cleaning, making your sweeping tasks more efficient and enjoyable.

Soft Bristle Sweeping Floor Brush - Experience the superior performance of the soft bristle sweeping brush that accompanies this sweeping brush and dustpan set. Specifically engineered with soft bristles, it excels at capturing dust, hair, and other small particles from various surfaces. Delicately yet effectively, this sweeping brush indoor broom ensures thorough cleaning without any worry of scratching or damaging the floor.

Compact and Easy to Store - Convenience meets efficiency with this tall dustpan and brush set, as it is designed to be compact and easily stored. The dust brush conveniently fits into the handle of the dust pan, resulting in a space-saving storage solution. With dust pan and brush set compact design, you can effortlessly store this brush and pan set in closets, utility rooms, or even in smaller cleaning spaces.

Trusted Brand – Supplied by The Dustpan and Brush Store with the end-user in mind. This brush and pan set long handle designed to offer a perfect solution for your cleaning needs. If you are looking for a dust pan and brush long handled that is not only premium quality but also reasonably priced, this is the right product for you.

Next page 1 No Need to Bend 2 180° Swivel Dustpan 3 Built-In Comb Teeth 4 Hanging Clip Versatile Dustpan and Brush Set For Living room, Kitchen, Bedroom etc. Make cleaning effortless with this long handled dustpan and brush set, thoughtfully designed in sleek black and grey. The dust pan and brush long handled combo features an ergonomic upright design with a 180° swivel dustpan, wide mouth, rubber lip for tight floor contact, and built-in comb teeth to keep your brush clean. Whether you're cleaning crumbs in the kitchen, pet hair in the living room, or fine dust in the hallway, this broom and dustpan set is a must-have tool for homes. Can I use this broom and dustpan set for hard flooring like laminate or tile? Absolutely. The rubber lip on the dustpan hugs flat surfaces tightly, making it ideal for hard floors like tile, wood, or laminate. Is this long handled dustpan and brush set suitable for elderly users? Yes! This tall dustpan and brush set allows you to clean without bending over, making it ideal for seniors or users with back pain. Is the brush handle detachable for compact storage? Yes, the long handled dustpan and brush features handles that clip together for easy upright storage, great for closets or utility rooms. Does this dustpan and brush set work well with pet hair? Definitely. The built-in comb teeth strip fur from the sweeping brush indoor, making it perfect for pet owners. Can this be used outdoors? It’s primarily designed for indoor use, but the long handled dustpan is also suitable for dry outdoor sweeping like patios or entryways.
